title: Iran threatens to extend conflict ‘beyond the region’ if U.S. and Israel resume attacks
summary_full: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Wednesday threatened to extend the Middle East conflict "beyond the region" if the U.S. and Israel resume attacks against Tehran.
summary_public: Iran's Revolutionary Guard on Wednesday threatened to extend the Middle East conflict "beyond the region" if the U.S. and Israel resume attacks against Tehran.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran threatens to extend conflict ‘beyond the region’ if U.S. and Israel resume attacks
